content:
I'll count the TypeScript interfaces defined with the `interface` keyword across the codebase.

From the code:

1. `MermaidOutputOptions` (diagram-generator.ts)
2. `RenderJob` (diagram-generator.ts)
3. `IProgressReporter` (progress.ts)
4. `WorkerInitData` (render-worker-pool.ts)
5. `RenderJob` (render-worker-pool.ts) — separate file from diagram-generator
6. `RenderResult` (render-worker-pool.ts)
7. `GroupingDecision` (types.ts)
8. `PackageGroup` (types.ts)
9. `LayoutDecision` (types.ts)
10. `ParseValidationResult` (types.ts)
11. `ValidationError` (types.ts)
12. `ValidationWarning` (types.ts)
13. `StructuralValidationResult` (types.ts)
14. `StructuralIssue` (types.ts)
15. `RenderValidationResult` (types.ts)
16. `RenderIssue` (types.ts)
17. `QualityValidationResult` (types.ts)
18. `QualityMetrics` (types.ts)
19. `QualitySuggestion` (types.ts)
20. `ValidationPipelineResult` (types.ts)
21. `MermaidGeneratorOptions` (types.ts)
22. `MermaidTheme` (types.ts)
23. `MermaidRendererOptions` (types.ts)
24. `MermaidOutputPaths` (types.ts)
25. `GrouperConfig` (types.ts)
26. `GroupingRule` (types.ts)
27. `LLMGrouperResponse` (types.ts)
28. `ParallelParserOptions` (parallel-parser.ts)
29. `ParsingMetrics` (parallel-parser.ts)
30. `ProgressEvent` (parallel-parser.ts)
31. `FileCompleteEvent` (parallel-parser.ts)
32. `CompletionEvent` (parallel-parser.ts)
33. `TreeNode` (ts-module-graph-renderer.ts)
34. `TsModuleGraphRenderOptions` (ts-module-graph-renderer.ts)

{"answer": 34}
